zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcom Colquhoun於1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯時，他的父親Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss20歲，母親Jean Erskine48歲。他於大約1419年與Elizabeth Dunbar在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcom Colquhoun于1390年出生在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾拉斯时，他的父亲Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss20岁，母亲Jean Erskine48岁。他于大约1419年与Elizabeth Dunbar在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特拉斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Malcom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcom Colquhoun was born in 1390, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss, was 20 and his mother, Jean Erskine, was 48. He married Elizabeth Dunbar about 1419, in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1440, in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcom Colquhoun est né en 1390, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jean Erskine, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dunbar environ 1419, à Luss, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1440, à Luss, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcom Colquhoun 1390 in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss 20 und seine Mutter Jean Erskine 48. Er hat um 1419 in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1440 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Luss, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcom Colquhoun è nato il nel 1390 nel Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Jean Erskine, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Dunbar circa 1419, nel Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Malcom Colquhounが1390年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルスで生まれた時，父Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Lussは20歳，母Jean Erskineは48歳であった。約1419年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトルスでElizabeth Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトルスで50歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcom Colquhoun(이)가 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean Erskine(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스에서 Elizabeth Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcom Colquhoun nasceu em 1390, em Luss, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jean Erskine, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dunbar aproximadamente 1419, em Luss, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.Luss, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcom Colquhoun родился в 1390 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Colquhoun - Eighth Lord of Colquhoun, Tenth Lord of Luss было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean Erskine, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dunbar около 1419 г. в местности лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1440 г. в местности лусс, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Dunbar aproximadamente 1419, en Luss, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1440, en Luss, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
